title: cacalia decumbens
intro: Cacalia decumbens, also known as creeping goldenseal, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cacalia decumbens include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Cacalia decumbens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional medicine practices to create topical creams and ointments.
